name: Low-Fat Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pumpkin, sugars, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, and salt in a large bowl and beat until well blended.
2. Add evaporated milk, egg substitute, and butter and stir to combine.
3. Pour enough filling into the prepared pie shell to fill it.
4. Pour the remaining filling into 2 to 3 custard cups and bake along with the pie.
5. Bake the pie and filled cups at 425 degrees for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for 35 to 40 minutes longer, or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean. Custard cups should be baked until set.
7. Cool to room temperature and serve, or cover and chill before serving.
